title: Story map showing the composition of the 2018 Census dataset | Stats NZ
content:
## Story map showing the composition of the 2018 Census dataset
23 September 2019, 11:00am
A map showing the proportion of people in the 2018 Census dataset and how they were counted is now available online, Stats NZ said today.
In July, we provided interim national coverage rates and associated data sources. We are now providing this information at a territorial authority / local board geography level. (Coverage compares the proportion of people counted in the census with the number of people that should have been counted on census night.)
The interactive story map 2018 Census dataset interim coverage & composition shows the proportion of people we counted in each area and how we counted them. This information will help you understand the composition and richness of the census dataset.
Kay Seatter-Dunbar 021 285 9191 communications@stats.govt.nz
